summary: `conf/phase2_sweeps/*.yaml` に role / canonical / alias / 推奨対応先の `metadata` を追加し、`run_sweep.py` / `plot_heatmap.py` から canonical profile 一覧と個別 profile 説明を表示できるようにした。wrapper は profile role mismatch も明示的に弾くようにし、README / Phase 2 current/tasks を metadata 駆動の discoverability に合わせて更新した。

tests_reviewed.command: uv run ruff check src/sim_swim/analysis/cli_profiles.py scripts/01_simulate_swimming/run_sweep.py scripts/01_simulate_swimming/plot_heatmap.py tests/test_phase2_sweep_profiles.py
uv run ruff format --check src/sim_swim/analysis/cli_profiles.py scripts/01_simulate_swimming/run_sweep.py scripts/01_simulate_swimming/plot_heatmap.py tests/test_phase2_sweep_profiles.py
tests_reviewed.result: PASS: 4 files already formatted after ruff format
PASS: canonical sweep profiles were listed
PASS: canonical heatmap profiles were listed
PASS: profile description showed role, canonical status, recommended heatmap profile, and alias list

adr_reason: CLI discoverability と profile metadata の追加であり、物理モデル、数値近似、恒久 I/O 契約の意味は変更していないため。
